formula_display: Net perimeter = room_perimeter - (doors × door_width); Boards = ceil(net_perimeter × 1.05 ÷ board_length)
result_context: Net perimeter: {net_perimeter_m} m, linear metres: {linear_meters} m, boards: {boards_needed}
steps: Subtract door openings: 2 × 0.9 m = 1.8 m → 16.2 m net
mistakes: Including door openings in the perimeter instead of subtracting them
Forgetting to account for inside corners where boards meet
Not allowing for end cuts — the offcut from one wall can often start the next

es.seo_description: Calcula el rodapié necesario para cualquier habitación. Introduce el perímetro, el número de puertas y la longitud de las tablas para obtener los metros lineales netos y las piezas exactas.

en.seo_description: Calculate baseboard materials for any room. Enter perimeter, door count, and board length to get net perimeter, linear metres, exact board count, and return pieces.
